methods.description: Process for preparing samples for lipid analysis by freeze drying, powdering, and extracting lipids using Soxhlet extraction followed by chromatographic separation.

steps.description: Samples for lipid analysis were freeze dried and powdered with a mortar and pestle prior to extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: freeze dry and powder samples for lipid analysis

steps.description: Approximately 500 mg of freeze-dried sample, with a moderate amount of C 46 -GDGT, were extracted by Soxhlet extraction with dichloromethane (DCM)/methanol (MeOH) (2/1, v/v) for 72 h.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Soxhlet extraction on samples with DCM/MeOH

steps.description: The solvent was evaporated and the extract was separated by Al 2 O 3 column chromatography with hexane/DCM (9/1, v/v) and DCM/MeOH (1/1, v/v) as sequential eluents.
steps.searchable_summary: separate extract using Al2O3 column chromatography

steps.description: The polar fraction (DCM/MeOH) was concentrated by rotary evaporation, redissolved in hexane/isopropanol (99/1, v/v), and filtered using a PTFE 0.45 μm filter.
The filtrate was tested by high-performance liquid chromatography/atmospheric pressure chemical ionization −mass spectrometry (HPLC/APCI−MS).

methods.method_name: Instrumental Methods for Chromatography and Mass Spectrometry
methods.description: Procedures for performing chromatography and mass spectrometry to analyze GDGTs using modified methods from previous studies.

steps.description: Analyses were performed using an Agilent 1200 series liquid chromatograph equipped with an auto-injector and ChemStation chromatography management software.
steps.searchable_summary: set up Agilent 1200 series liquid chromatograph for analysis

steps.description: Separation was effected with a Prevail Cyano column (2.1 mm × 150 mm, 3 μm; Alltech, Deerfield, USA) kept at 30°C.
steps.searchable_summary: use Prevail Cyano column for separation at 30°C

steps.description: GDGTs were eluted isocratically with 99% hexane and 1% propanol for 5 min, followed by a linear gradient to 2% propanol over 40 min.
After each analysis, the column was cleaned by back-flushing hexane/propanol (90:10, v/v) at 0.2 mL/min for 15 min.
steps.searchable_summary: clean column by back-flushing with hexane/propanol

steps.description: Detection was achieved using atmospheric pressure, positive ion chemical ionization-Agilent 6410 triple quad mass spectrometer (APCI−MS).
Absolute concentrations were calculated using a newly synthesized internal standard material (C 46 -GDGT).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate concentrations using internal standard C 46 -GDGT

methods.method_name: Sampling and Dating of Peat Cores
methods.description: Procedure for sampling peat cores from the Hongyuan area and establishing an age model using 210 Pb dating.

steps.description: The sampling site is located 2 km west of Hongyuan County in the Zoigê peat-core area in Hongyuan, Sichuan, at an altitude of 3510 m above sea level.
steps.searchable_summary: locate and describe sampling site in Hongyuan area

steps.description: The sampling tool was a stainless steel Wardenaar. The sample column was 25 cm long.
steps.searchable_summary: use Wardenaar tool to collect peat core samples

steps.description: The whole sample column was put into a PVC tube and kept at −10°C in the laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: store sample column in PVC tube at -10°C

steps.description: The sample was divided longitudinally into two parts: one was used for 210 Pb dating, and the other (subsampled at intervals of 0.5 cm) was used for GDGTs testing.
steps.searchable_summary: divide sample for 210 Pb dating and GDGTs testing

steps.description: The age model was established using 210 Pb data from the Nanjing Institute of Geography and Limnology, Chinese Academy of Sciences.
steps.searchable_summary: establish age model using 210 Pb data
